Men's Basketball Schedule Roster Coaches Statistics Recruits Camps More+

2025-26 Men's Basketball Roster

33 Justin Grimes

  • Class Freshman
  • Position Guard
  • Height 5-10
  • Weight 160
  • Hometown Greenville, N.C.
  • High School JH Rose
  • Bio
  • Related
  • Stats

Biography

HIGH SCHOOL: Prepped at JH Rose High School for coach Robert Duck ... Helped his team to a 23-5 record during his senior year ... Averaged 17.3 points, 2.2 assists and 2.1 steals per game ... Earned all-conference, Conference Player of the Year, 2nd Team All-District and the Holiday Classic MVP laurels during his senior year ... Also lettered in baseball. 

PERSONAL: The son of Latonya and Timothy Grimes ... Has an older brother, Jayden ... Maintained a 3.5 grade point average at JH Rose High School ... Enjoys ice skating, TopGolf and playing pickle ball ... The Karate Kid is his favorite movie and the Golden State Warriors are his favorite team ... Steak is his favorite food ... A mass communications major at UNCP.



 

CAREER HIGHS AT UNCP (Updated: 3/9/2026)
Points 4 at Francis Marion (1/8/26)
FG 1 at Francis Marion (1/8/26)
FGA 1, three times - last vs. Mount Olive (2/18/26)
3FG 1 at Francis Marion (1/8/26)
3FGA 1, three times - last vs. Mount Olive (2/18/26)
FT 1 at Francis Marion (1/8/26)
FTA 2 at Francis Marion (1/8/26)
Rebounds 2 at Erskine (1/18/26)
Assists 1 at Erskine (1/18/26)
